name: Light Spinach Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs fresh spinach (well washed, stems removed)
3 tablespoons dehydrated minced or chopped onion
1 can (8 oz) sliced water chestnuts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh spinach, steam it over rapidly boiling water for 1 to 2 minutes until tender, then drain well.
2. If using frozen spinach, simply squeeze out the excess moisture but do not cook.
3. In a small bowl, combine the dehydrated onion, flour, dry milk, onion powder, sugar, turmeric, and salt.
4. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the remaining ingredients with the drained spinach. Add the dry ingredients to the spinach mixture and mix well.
5. Chill for several hours before serving in a hollowed-out bread round if desired.
Makes about 6 cups.
